title: ligularia glauca
intro: Ligularia glauca, also known as the Leopard Plant, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its striking foliage and yellow daisy-like blooms. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ligularia glauca are numerous, ranging from reducing fever and relieving coughs to alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations like tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
